summary: Joel Spolsky provides a brief travel update for his FogBugz world tour, listing upcoming cities across the US and Europe. He encourages waitlisted readers to sign up, noting they'll likely be accommodated. He mentions that the Austin event will be streamed online using NewTek's TriCaster portable broadcast studio. The post is essentially a logistical announcement with no substantive argument or insight.
key_points: The FogBugz world tour is visiting multiple US cities including Arlington, Atlanta, Dallas, Austin, and Boulder
Waitlisted attendees are encouraged to sign up as most are being accommodated
The Austin event will be broadcast online using NewTek's TriCaster portable broadcast technology
European dates in Dublin, London, Cambridge, Amsterdam, and Copenhagen are planned for November
money_quotes: We've been doing a pretty good job of getting everyone in, so don't worry if you're waitlisted… we'll probably fit you in.
key_insight: A brief logistical update on Joel's FogBugz world tour schedule with no substantive technical or business content.
